macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Ceasefire Holds Amid Failed Peace Talks; Strait of Hormuz Closure Remains Key Market Driver
items.summary: Weekend peace talks between the US and Iran ended without agreement, but the ceasefire remains in place. Markets continue to focus on the Strait of Hormuz closure risk, which is driving oil prices and inflation expectations globally, with central banks preparing to assess second-round inflationary effects.

items.title: Global GDP Reached $120 Trillion in 2025; Expected to Grow to $220 Trillion by 2050
items.summary: The IMF reports global GDP finished 2025 at $120 trillion, with Gallup analysts projecting average annual growth of 2.5% over the next 25 years, adding approximately $100 trillion in new economic activity by 2050. The US, EU, and China collectively represent nearly two-thirds of global economic output.

items.title: UN Report: Gap Between Rich and Poor Nations Widening; Development Aid Drops 23%
items.summary: A UN report ahead of IMF and World Bank spring meetings reveals that promised actions to narrow wealth inequality remain unfulfilled, with development assistance from 25 countries declining 23% in 2025—the largest annual contraction on record. The US led the decline with a 59% drop in development aid.

items.title: IMF Warns Iran Conflict Darkens Global Economic Outlook
items.summary: IMF Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva stated the organization had been prepared to upgrade global growth forecasts, but the Iran war has now darkened the outlook for the world economy, with geopolitical tensions compounding financing challenges for developing nations.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: RaveDAO's RAVE Token Surges 163% in 24 Hours to Rank #55
items.summary: RaveDAO's RAVE token experienced a remarkable 163% price increase over the past 24 hours, reaching $5.77 with a $1.42 billion market cap and $428 million in trading volume. The rally has propelled it into the top 60 cryptocurrencies by market cap.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds Above $70K Amid Iran Talks Collapse and Bullish Predictions
items.summary: Bitcoin price dipped 3.4% to $71,158 following the collapse of U.S.-Iran talks but remains above $70,000 with long-term holders controlling 78% of supply; JP Morgan maintains a $170,000 price prediction.

items.title: Japan Reclassifies Crypto as Financial Instruments, Banning Insider Trading
items.summary: Japan's cabinet approved a bill reclassifying cryptocurrencies as financial instruments equivalent to stocks and bonds, introducing bans on insider trading and annual disclosure requirements.

items.title: Bitcoin Enters Geopolitical Tensions as Iran Demands BTC Payments for Hormuz Strait
items.summary: Iran reportedly wants ships to pay in Bitcoin to pass through the Strait of Hormuz amid escalating tensions, potentially integrating BTC into a critical trade chokepoint affected by sanctions.

items.title: European Central Bank Selects XRP Ledger for Settlement Pilots
items.summary: The European Central Bank has chosen the XRP Ledger for settlement pilots, signaling potential institutional adoption of blockchain technology for financial infrastructure.

items.title: CLARITY Act Faces Intense Pressure from Treasury and SEC for Senate Markup
items.summary: The U.S. Treasury and SEC are coordinating a multi-agency push on the Senate to advance the CLARITY Act after months of delay, aiming for a Banking Committee markup.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: MiniMax Open-Sources Self-Improving AI Model M2.7
items.summary: Chinese company MiniMax released M2.7, an open-source self-improving AI model excelling in coding, software engineering, office work, and multi-agent automation, achieving 97% skill compliance on complex tasks. It reportedly outperforms OpenAI models in certain benchmarks.

items.title: Google Adds Voice Control to Mixboard
items.summary: Google is integrating full voice control into Mixboard, enhancing collaborative AI tools for hands-free operation.

items.title: OpenAI Develops Unified Codex Agent App
items.summary: OpenAI is building an all-in-one Codex agent app to streamline managed agent workflows for coding and automation tasks.

items.title: Meta Launches Muse Spark with Parallel Reasoning
items.summary: Meta introduced Muse Spark, featuring parallel reasoning capabilities to scale multi-agent AI systems.

items.title: Runable Introduces RunClaw for Team Chat AI Delegation
items.summary: Runable launched RunClaw, enabling delegated AI work directly within team chat tools for efficient automation.

items.title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai Urges U.S. Leadership in AI
items.summary: In a 60 Minutes interview, Sundar Pichai stated that America must lead in AI development boldly and responsibly to benefit all Americans.

items.title: Nationwide AI Data Center Boom Faces Community Resistance
items.summary: Tech companies are building over 4,000 AI data centers across the U.S. to power AI initiatives, sparking opposition from communities concerned about environmental and financial impacts.

items.title: Sen. Dave McCormick Discusses AI, Energy, and U.S.-China Rivalry
items.summary: Senator Dave McCormick highlighted the link between energy demands, AI growth, U.S. competition with China, and the role of nuclear power in an extended interview.

items.title: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis on AI Risks and Future
items.summary: Demis Hassabis discussed AI's spiritual roots, risks of misuse, competitive pressures, and his ongoing goals in a new interview.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
